title: MobDisguise
description: This mod allows you to disguise as every mob!
body:
# MobDisguise — Become Any Mob!

**MobDisguise** lets you transform into *any* Minecraft entity with a simple command — even the **Ender Dragon**!  
Perfect for roleplay, trolling, cinematic gameplay, or just experiencing the world from a new perspective.

## Features

- 🧙 **Disguise as any entity** using  
  `/disguise <entity>`  
  From chickens to creepers, wardens, villagers — *everything* works.
  
- 🐉 **Ender Dragon support**  
  When disguising as the Ender Dragon, the **camera automatically adjusts** to make flying feel smooth and intuitive.
  
- 🌀 **Return to your normal form** with  
  `/undisguise`
  
- 🎭 **Fully synced movement**  
  The disguised mob walks, rotates, and moves exactly as you do.
  
- 🌍 **Singleplayer & Multiplayer compatible**  
  Other players on the server will **see your disguise** as well


## 📦 Commands

| Command | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/disguise <entity>` | Turns you into the selected entity |
| `/undisguise` | Restores your normal player appearance |

---

If you have any feedback, let me know in the comment section or add an issue to the github for any bugs!
